title: Verify attributable plan history
preconditions: A plan can undergo repeated draft creation, activation, supersession, category rename/archive, and period closure under distinct actor reasons and timestamps.
steps: Exercise the lifecycle and inspect every event and immutable revision required by NFR-BUDGET-ATTRIBUTABLE-HISTORY.
expected: Every required stable reference, actor, reason, timestamp, prior state, resulting state, and replacement reference is present; historical plan payload hashes remain unchanged.
